nasb.text: For indeed circumcision is of value if you practice the Law; but if you are a transgressor of the Law, your circumcision has become uncircumcision.

esv.text: For circumcision indeed is of value if you obey the law, but if you break the law, your circumcision becomes uncircumcision.

cnv.text: 你若遵行律法，割禮固然有益處；但你若是犯律法的，你的割禮就不是割禮了。

ccb.text: 如果你遵行律法，割礼才有价值；如果你违犯律法，受了割礼也如同未受割礼。

csbs.text: 你如果是遵行律法的，割礼才有益处；但你如果是违犯律法的人，你的割礼就不是割礼了。
